signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Passers with this ability have faster passing animations when they are throwing under pressure
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws under 40 yards while running outside the pocket (except on high/low throws).
Passers with this ability receive better blocking support on designed quarterback run plays.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, inside the numbers
Truly devastating receiving threats are the ones that catch and can't be caught. When they enter the zone, they have increased fakeout rates on spin/juke/hurdle after the catch.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
Running backs with this ability have better catch in traffic and route running when coming out of the backfield against linebackers and linemen.
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable spin animations.
Ballcarriers with this ability retain more of their forward momentum during tackles while travelling at high speeds.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Players with this ability will recover from the effects of Wear and Tear and fatigue at an increased rate between plays.
Wrecking Ball runners don't avoid contact. They create it. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their success rate on trucks and stiff arms.
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Blockers with this ability have stronger protection against dominant bull rush moves attempted by defenders
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability are almost guaranteed to win any double team block they are engaged in
